questions: Should image-upscale and video-enhance require a prompt? Currently executeCreateTask requires prompt for all task types, but upscale/enhance don't semantically need one. The plan relaxes this — confirm that's acceptable.

For model selection on image-to-video: should the agent pass the worker model name (e.g. 'ltx2_22B') or a friendlier name that the travel_between_images resolver maps? Need to check if the resolver handles the mapping or if the agent must send the exact worker model name.

Character animate needs both a character image and a motion video. The plan uses reference_image_urls[0] for the character and video_url for the motion video. Is that the right UX, or should both come from selected clips in a different way?
Are there existing tests for the agent tools, or is this only tested manually via the agent chat?

success_criteria.criterion: All 10 task types (5 existing + 5 new) are present in the tool schema enum and route to the correct create-task family
Model selection works for text-to-image (wan/z-image/qwen-image) and image-to-video (wan/ltx-2.3/ltx-2.3-fast)
Each new builder function produces an input object matching the corresponding resolver's required fields
Validation correctly enforces required params per task type (e.g. video_url for video-enhance, reference_image_urls for image-to-image)
System prompt includes examples and model guide for all new task types
No changes to create-task edge function or any resolver files
Existing tests (if any) continue to pass
Builder functions include only essential params, letting resolver defaults handle the rest
Tool schema descriptions are clear enough for Claude to route correctly without ambiguity
Each new generation path tested end-to-end through the agent chat

assumptions: Masked edit is excluded — the agent cannot draw masks, making this task type impractical without a separate mask-drawing UI step.
Crossfade-join, join-clips, edit-video-orchestrator, and individual-travel-segment are excluded — these are complex orchestration tasks that require multi-step coordination beyond a single tool call.
For image-upscale and video-enhance, prompt is not semantically meaningful. The plan relaxes the prompt requirement for these task types, passing a placeholder or empty string to the builder.
The model names exposed to the LLM agent (e.g. 'z-image', 'ltx-2.3') will be mapped to the resolver-expected model_name values in generation.ts, not passed through raw.
video_url is a new tool schema property (not reusing reference_image_urls) because video inputs are semantically different and the agent needs clear type guidance.
The travel_between_images resolver handles model_name mapping internally (agent sends friendly name, resolver maps to worker model). Will verify during implementation.
structure_warnings: Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.
